faqs.question: Why are crickets so common in Melrose apartments and homes?
faqs.answer: Melrose's older building stock, proximity to St. Mary's Park, and dense urban landscape provide ideal conditions for crickets. They enter through cracks in foundations, window frames, and door gaps, seeking shelter and moisture. Our cricket control service targets entry points and nesting areas specific to Melrose properties.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a cricket infestation in Melrose?
faqs.answer: Most cricket infestations in Melrose properties are significantly reduced within 24-48 hours of treatment. Complete elimination typically occurs within 1-2 weeks, depending on the severity. We provide follow-up visits to ensure all crickets are removed and prevent re-infestation.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 cricket control service include?
faqs.answer: Our cricket control service includes a thorough property inspection, identification of entry points and harborage areas, targeted treatment using safe and effective methods, sealing of entry points, and a follow-up visit. Pricing varies based on property size and infestation severity.

faqs.question: Are your cricket control treatments safe for families and pets in Melrose homes?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and eco-friendly methods that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We provide clear instructions for any necessary precautions and work around your schedule to minimize disruption to your Melrose household.
